name: Our Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine on medium to low heat.
2. Roll graham crackers into crumbs with a rolling pin.
3. Mix the crumbs and melted margarine until combined.
4. Pat the mixture onto the bottom and sides of the pie pan, then chill.
5. Add cold evaporated milk to Dream Whip (do not add vanilla). Sprinkle in 24 pkg. Equal. Mix according to directions.
6. Beat egg yolks slightly, and gradually stir in lemon juice.
7. Gradually fold in the whipped Dream Whip into the yolk mixture.
8. Spread the filling into the crust.
9. Turn on the broiler so it will get hot.
10. Beat 3 egg whites until frothy using clean beaters to ensure they are fluffy.
11. Add 1 tbsp sugar and beat until blended in.
12. Add another tbsp sugar and 24 pkg. Equal, then beat until soft peaks form.
13. Spread the meringue over the top of the pie.
14. Spread the meringue to stick along the edges so it won't shrink when broiled.
15. Put under the broiler for 30-60 seconds until the meringue is lightly browned.
16. Chill for 5 hours before serving to allow flavors to blend.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 144, fat 5g, cholesterol .6mg, carbohydrate 27g, sodium 81mg.
Exchanges: Bread 1, fruit 1/2, milk 1/2, fat 1.
